name: Joebox Cloud
description: Analyzes the behavior of malicious files including PEs, PDFs, DOCs, PPTs, XLSs, APKs, URLs and MachOs on Windows, Android and Mac OS X for suspicious activities. Tool: https://jbxcloud.joesecurity.org/login. [SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #622 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map Joebox Cloud output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target
parameters.help: Host, URL or path the tool acts on. When implementing, consider type 'target' or 'url' so the runner enforces the engagement scope.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Offline mode: a saved Joebox Cloud output file to parse instead of running it live.
